# fossui

An open-source Flutter UI library, inspired by Cal.com's design system. Themed
from one source and accessible, reached through a single import that gives you
the theme system and every component.

```dart
import 'package:fossui/fossui.dart';
```

## Theming

Tokens live in a `ThemeExtension`. `FossThemeData.light` and `FossThemeData.dark`
are the defaults; pass your own to retheme. Register it once, then read tokens
through `context.fossTheme`.

- Material app: `MaterialApp(theme: FossThemeData.light.toThemeData(), darkTheme: FossThemeData.dark.toThemeData())`.
- Non-Material app: wrap the subtree in `FossTheme(data: FossThemeData.light, child: ...)`.
- Read: `context.fossTheme` resolves the `FossTheme` widget first, then the theme
  extension, then the light default.

Token bundles on `FossThemeData`: `colors` (FossColors), `typography`
(FossTypography), `radii` (FossRadii), `spacing` (FossSpacing), `shadows`
(FossShadows), `motion` (FossMotion). There is no `FossApp` wrapper.

## Components

All are `Foss`-prefixed. Variants and sizes are enums passed as named params; a
single `style` object per component is the one-off override escape hatch. Icon
slots take any `Widget`, so the package has no icon dependency.

- FossAlert, FossAlertDialog
- FossAvatar, FossBadge
- FossButton (plus `FossButton.icon`), FossCard
- FossCheckbox (FossCheckboxGroup), FossRadio (FossRadioGroup)
- FossCombobox (FossMultiCombobox, FossAutocomplete), FossSelect (FossMultiSelect)
- FossDialog, FossDrawer
- FossProgress, FossSpinner, FossSlider
- FossSeparator, FossTabs
- FossSwitch, FossTextField
- FossToast, FossToaster, FossTooltip

## Links

- Homepage: https://fossui.org
- Documentation: https://fossui.org/docs
- Repository: https://github.com/fossui/fossui
